title: Supporting data for "Identification of epigenetic regulators of fibrotic transformation in cardiac fibroblasts through bulk and single-cell CRISPR screens"
author: Esser-Skala, Wolfgang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
data.tgz  contains all data necessary for reproducing the analysis in the manuscript. After cloning the GitHub repository, extract the contents of this file into folder  data_generated . 
   
  Changelog  
  v1.1.0 – 2025-09-29  
 
 data for the accepted publication 
 
  v1.0.0 – 2025-02-03  
 
 initial release
